content.body: just to confirm we are meeting today ? I'm waiting in the meeting hallway..
nice...I got the time wrong :) see you later
Folks, I totally messed up my schedule and can't really host the meeting today, and due to an injury haven't been able to keep up with my workload. I am very sorry
i apologize for the very late notice
understandable, hope to see you wednesday. i'm finishing up some updates to clause 4 and annex b and will push in the next 48h
also, you mentioned a one-off friday call this week? what time would that be? so i can block the slot on my calendar, thanks
would be at the same time 4pm - 6pm
I will go to the meeting at least to apologize
